---
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%d %B, %Y')`"
output: 
  rmdformats::readthedown:
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(knitr)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE,  
                      message=FALSE, 
                      warning=FALSE, 
                      results = 'asis', 
                      fig.width=7, 
                      fig.height = 7,
                      tidy = TRUE, 
                      tidy.opts = list(comment = FALSE))
```

```{css, echo=FALSE}
#content{
    max-width:1920px;
}

.main-container {
  max-width: 1920px !important;
  margin-left: auto;
  margin-right: auto;
}
```

```{r data, echo = FALSE}
library(sf)
source("reportFunctions.R")
source("scRNA_func.r")

options(future.globals.maxSize = 600000 * 1024^2)
options(future.seed = TRUE)

myoptions<-read_file_map("fileList2.txt", do_unlist=FALSE)
email=myoptions$email
affiliation=get_affiliation(myoptions)
assay=myoptions$assay
image_slide=myoptions$image_assay
data_type=myoptions$data_type
if(is.null(data_type)){
  data_type="VisiumHD"
}
bubblemap_file=myoptions$bubblemap_file
bubblemap_width_in=as.numeric(myoptions$bubblemap_width_in)
species=myoptions$species

file_map=fread("fileList1.txt", sep="\t", header=FALSE, col.names=c("path", "name"))
sample_name=file_map$name[1]
obj_file=file_map$path[1]
```

---
title: "MEcell choose - `r sample_name`"
author:
- name: `r email`
  affiliation: `r affiliation`
---

```{r}
library(Seurat)

obj=readRDS(obj_file)
obj=UpdateSeuratObject(obj)

if (data_type=="CosMx") { #set fov to NULL for CosMx data
  image_slide=NULL
}

meta_rds=paste0(sample_name, ".all.meta.rds")
meta=readRDS(meta_rds)
stopifnot(all(rownames(meta) == colnames(obj)))

obj@meta.data=meta

deleted=sum(meta$cell_type == "DELETE")
```

There are `r deleted` cells marked as DELETE in the meta data, which will be excluded from downstream analysis.

```{r}
cells=rownames(meta)[meta$cell_type != "DELETE"]
obj=subset(obj, cells=cells)
obj@meta.data$cell_type=factor_by_count(obj@meta.data$cell_type)
obj@meta.data$seurat_clusters=as.numeric(obj@meta.data$cell_type) - 1
obj@meta.data$seurat_cell_type=paste0(obj@meta.data$seurat_clusters, ": ", obj@meta.data$cell_type)

ct_levels=obj@meta.data |>
  dplyr::select("seurat_clusters", "seurat_cell_type") |>
  dplyr::distinct() |>
  dplyr::arrange(seurat_clusters) |>
  dplyr::pull(seurat_cell_type)
obj@meta.data$seurat_cell_type=factor(obj@meta.data$seurat_cell_type, levels=ct_levels)

final_meta_rds=paste0(sample_name, ".final.meta.rds")
saveRDS(obj@meta.data, final_meta_rds)

final_cellids_csv=paste0(sample_name, ".final.cellids.csv")
write.csv(obj@meta.data |> dplyr::select("cell_id", "seurat_cell_type"), final_cellids_csv, row.names = FALSE, quote = FALSE)
```

```{r}
hasAzimuth="Azimuth" %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)
hasRCTD="RCTD1" %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)
hasSingleR="SingleR" %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)
hasSignacX="SignacX" %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)
hasUMAP="umap" %in% names(obj@reductions)
hasImageFeatures="cell_area_um2" %in% colnames(obj@meta.data)

validation_columns = c()
if(hasRCTD){
  validation_columns = c(validation_columns, "RCTD1", "RCTD1_first_type")
}
if(hasAzimuth){
  validation_columns = c(validation_columns, "Azimuth")
}
if(hasSingleR){
  validation_columns = c(validation_columns, "SingleR")
}
if(hasSignacX){
  validation_columns = c(validation_columns, "SignacX")
}
```

# Cell type clusters

```{r}
ct_df=get_freq_table(obj@meta.data, "seurat_cell_type")
print_table(ct_df, byDT=FALSE, row.names=FALSE)
```

```{r}
detail_folder="details"
if(!dir.exists(detail_folder)){
  dir.create(detail_folder)
}

file_prefix = paste0(detail_folder, "/", sample_name)

cluster_count_col = "seurat_cell_type_count"
obj@meta.data = add_column_count(obj@meta.data, "seurat_cell_type", cluster_count_col, order_by_count=TRUE)

cluster_colors = get_colors(current_cell_types=unique(obj@meta.data[[cluster_count_col]]))
Idents(obj) <- cluster_count_col
```

# Spatial images

```{r}
tissue_image =  ImageDimPlot (object = obj) + 
                ggtitle(paste0("Tissue : ", sample_name)) +
                theme(legend.position = "none",
                      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
                      panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth=1))
tissue_image = adjust_ImagePlot_Polygons(tissue_image)

plots <- list("Tissue Image" = tissue_image)

plots[['ImageDimPlot']] = get_image_dim_plot( obj=obj, 
                                              assay=assay, 
                                              group.by=cluster_count_col, 
                                              colors=cluster_colors, 
                                              fov_name=image_slide,
                                              title="")

if (data_type!="CosMx") {
  pt.size.factor = ifelse(grepl("Polygons", assay), 0.5, 12)
  Idents(obj) <- cluster_count_col
  plots[['SpatialDimPlot']] = SpatialDimPlot( obj, 
                                              group.by=cluster_count_col,
                                              cols = cluster_colors, 
                                              image.alpha = 0.1,
                                              pt.size.factor = pt.size.factor) + 
                              theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5), 
                                    panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth=1))  
}

cluster_png = save_vis_png(plots, file_prefix, cluster_colors, cluster_count_col, assay)
include_graphics(cluster_png)
```

```{r eval=hasUMAP}
cat("\n# UMAP\n\n")
cluster_col="seurat_clusters"
scolors=cluster_colors
names(scolors)=levels(obj@meta.data[[cluster_col]])
g = get_dim_plot(obj, reduction='umap', group.by=cluster_col, label.by=cluster_count_col, scolors=scolors) + 
  ggtitle("UMAP") + theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5))
umap_png = paste0(file_prefix, ".umap.png")    
width=ifelse(length(cluster_colors) > 17, 12, 9)
ggsave(umap_png, g, width=width, height=6, units="in", dpi=300, bg="white")
include_graphics(umap_png)
```

# Image dim plot of each cluster

```{r}
g = ImageDimPlot( object = obj, 
                  fov = image_slide, 
                  split.by = cluster_count_col,
                  border.size = NA,
                  axes = F, 
                  dark.background = F, 
                  coord.fixed = T) + 
  theme(plot.title = element_blank(), 
        panel.border = element_rect(colour = "black", fill=NA, linewidth=1),
        legend.position = "none",
        strip.background = element_rect(fill="white"))
g = adjust_ImagePlot_Polygons(g)
ncol = ifelse(length(cluster_colors) <= 3, length(cluster_colors), ceiling(sqrt(length(cluster_colors))))
nrow = ceiling(length(cluster_colors) / ncol)

ct_individual_png = paste0(file_prefix, ".ct_individual.png")
ggsave(ct_individual_png, g, width=ncol * 2.8, height=nrow * 2.8 + 0.3, units="in", dpi=300, bg="white")
include_graphics(ct_individual_png)
```

# Marker genes

```{r}
g<-get_bubble_plot( obj=obj,
                    group.by=cluster_count_col,
                    bubblemap_file = bubblemap_file, 
                    assay = assay, 
                    species=species)
bubblemap_png = paste0(file_prefix, ".dot.png")
ggsave(bubblemap_png, g, width=bubblemap_width_in, height=max(4, length(cluster_colors) * 0.3 + 2), units="in", dpi=300, bg="white", limitsize = FALSE)
include_graphics(bubblemap_png)
```

# Validation barplot

```{r}
bar_file= paste0(file_prefix, ".validation_barplot.png")
g<-get_barplot( ct_meta=obj@meta.data, 
                bar_file=bar_file,
                cluster_name=cluster_count_col, 
                validation_columns=validation_columns,
                calc_height_per_cluster=200, 
                calc_width_per_cell=50)
include_graphics(bar_file)
```

# Violin plots of nCount

```{r}
gd = FetchData(obj, c(cluster_count_col, paste0("nCount_", assay)))
g=ggplot( gd, aes(x=!!sym(cluster_count_col), y=!!sym(paste0("nCount_", assay)))) + 
              geom_violin(scale="width") +
              geom_boxplot(width=0.1, outliers=FALSE) +
              theme_classic() +
              theme(axis.text.x=element_text(angle=90, hjust=1, vjust=0.5),
                    axis.title.x=element_blank())
vln_png = paste0(file_prefix, ".vln.png")
ggsave(vln_png, g, width=max(5, length(cluster_colors) * 0.4 + 2), height=4, units="in", dpi=300, bg="white", limitsize = FALSE)
include_graphics(vln_png)
```

```{r, eval=hasImageFeatures}
obj_image_df=obj@meta.data |>
  dplyr::select(cell_id, !!sym(cluster_count_col), cell_area_um2, cell_perimeter_um, cell_circularity, nucleus_area_um2, nucleus_perimeter_um, nucleus_circularity) |>
  dplyr::mutate(area_ratio = nucleus_area_um2 / cell_area_um2,
                perimeter_ratio = nucleus_perimeter_um / cell_perimeter_um ) |>
  tibble::rownames_to_column('cell') |>
  dplyr::rename(Subcluster_count = !!sym(cluster_count_col)) |>
  dplyr::select(cell, cell_id, everything())

melt_df=reshape2::melt(obj_image_df, id.vars=c('cell', 'cell_id', 'Subcluster_count'))
melt_df$sample=sample_name
melt_df$variable=factor(melt_df$variable, levels=c("cell_area_um2", "nucleus_area_um2", "cell_perimeter_um", "nucleus_perimeter_um", "cell_circularity", "nucleus_circularity", "area_ratio", "perimeter_ratio"))

g=ggplot(melt_df, aes(x=Subcluster_count, y=value)) +
  geom_boxplot(outliers=FALSE, width=0.5) +
  facet_wrap(~variable, ncol=2, scales="free_y") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1, vjust=0.5),
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        legend.position="none",
        strip.background = element_blank())

feature_png = paste0(file_prefix, ".image_features.png")
ggsave(feature_png, g, width=max(5, length(cluster_colors) * 0.8 + 2), height=8, units="in", dpi=300, bg="white", limitsize = FALSE)

cat("\n# Box plots of image features\n\n")
include_graphics(feature_png)
```


```{r}
markers_rds = paste0(file_prefix, ".markers.rds")
if(file.exists(markers_rds)){
  markers = readRDS(markers_rds)
}else{
  markers = FindAllMarkers( obj, 
                            assay = assay, 
                            only.pos = TRUE, 
                            min.pct = 0.25, 
                            logfc.threshold = 0.25,
                            group.by = cluster_count_col)
  saveRDS(markers, markers_rds)
}
has_markers = nrow(markers) > 0
```

```{r, eval=has_markers}
heatmap_png = paste0(file_prefix, ".heatmap.png")
if(!file.exists(heatmap_png)){
  top5 = markers |>
    dplyr::filter(p_val_adj < 0.05) |>
    dplyr::mutate(score = avg_log2FC * (pct.1 - pct.2)) |>
    dplyr::group_by(cluster) |>
    dplyr::slice_max(order_by = score, n = 5)

  g = MyDoHeatMap( obj, 
                  features = top5$gene, 
                  group.by = cluster_col, 
                  assay = assay) 

  width<-max(6, length(cluster_colors) * 1)
  height<-max(3, length(top5$gene) * 0.2)
  ggsave(heatmap_png, g, width=width, height=height, units="in", dpi=300, bg="white", limitsize = FALSE)
}

cat("\n# Heatmap of top 5 markers per cluster\n\n")
include_graphics(heatmap_png)
```

# Session Info

```{r}
print_table(get_packages_table(), byDT=TRUE, row.names=F)
```
